title: Senior Full-Stack .NET Developer for Multi-Vehicle Squad
company: If P&C Insurance AS Latvijas filiāle

summary.lv: If P&C Insurance meklē Senior Full-Stack .NET izstrādātāju Multi-Vehicle komandai, kas izstrādās auto un transporta apdrošināšanas digitālos pakalpojumus Ziemeļvalstu un Baltijas tirgum.
summary.en: If P&C Insurance is hiring a Senior Full-Stack .NET Developer for the Multi-Vehicle Squad — building motor and transport insurance digital services for the Nordic and Baltic markets.
